sentences.target: Je couvre la casserole avec un couvercle.
sentences.reading: /ʒə kuvʁ la kasʁɔl avɛk œ̃ kuvɛʁkl/

translations.fr: Je couvre la casserole avec un couvercle.
translations.ipa: /ʒə kuvʁ la kasʁɔl avɛk œ̃ kuvɛʁkl/
translations.en: I cover the pot with a lid.
translations.es: Cubro la olla con una tapa.
translations.de: Ich decke den Topf mit einem Deckel ab.
translations.it: Copro la pentola con un coperchio.
translations.pt: Cubro a panela com uma tampa.
translations.nl: Ik dek de pan af met een deksel.
translations.hi: मैं बर्तन को ढक्कन से ढकता हूँ.
translations.el: Σκεπάζω την κατσαρόλα με ένα καπάκι.
translations.nb: Jeg dekker gryten med et lokk.
translations.sv: Jag täcker kastrullen med ett lock.
translations.da: Jeg dækker gryden med et låg.

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular subject pronoun; grammatical subject of the clause.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive, selects a direct object.
Definite article, feminine singular; determines the noun 'casserole'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'couvre'.
Preposition introducing an instrumental phrase.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determines 'couvercle'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'avec' (instrument).

sentences.target: Tu couvres le bébé avec la couverture.
sentences.reading: /ty kuvʁ lə bebe avɛk la kuvɛʁtyʁ/

translations.fr: Tu couvres le bébé avec la couverture.
translations.ipa: /ty kuvʁ lə bebe avɛk la kuvɛʁtyʁ/
translations.en: You cover the baby with a blanket.
translations.es: Cubres al bebé con una manta.
translations.de: Du deckst das Baby mit einer Decke zu.
translations.it: Copri il bambino con una coperta.
translations.pt: Você cobre o bebê com um cobertor.
translations.vi: Bạn đắp chăn cho em bé.
translations.nl: Je dekt de baby toe met een deken.
translations.hi: तुम बच्चे को कंबल से ढकते हो.
translations.el: Σκεπάζεις το μωρό με μια κουβέρτα.
translations.nb: Du legger et teppe over babyen.
translations.sv: Du lägger en filt över bebisen.
translations.ro: Îl acoperi pe bebeluș cu o pătură.
translations.da: Du lægger et tæppe over babyen.
translations.ja: 赤ちゃんに毛布をかけます。

tokens.explanation: 2nd person singular subject pronoun; grammatical subject.
Main verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; transitive.
Definite article, masculine singular; determines 'bébé'.
Common noun, masculine (invariable in form), singular; direct object of 'couvres'.
Preposition introducing a means/instrument phrase.
Definite article, feminine singular; determines 'couverture'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of 'avec' (instrument).

sentences.target: On couvre la table avec une nappe.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ kuvʁ la tabl avɛk yn nap/

translations.fr: On couvre la table avec une nappe.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ kuvʁ la tabl avɛk yn nap/
translations.en: We cover the table with a tablecloth.
translations.es: Cubrimos la mesa con un mantel.
translations.de: Wir legen eine Tischdecke auf den Tisch.
translations.it: Copriamo il tavolo con una tovaglia.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在桌子上铺上桌布。
translations.pt: Cobrimos a mesa com uma toalha de mesa.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi phủ khăn trải bàn lên bàn.
translations.nl: We leggen een tafellaken op tafel.
translations.hi: हम मेज़ पर मेज़पोश बिछाते हैं.
translations.nb: Vi dekker bordet med en duk.
translations.id: Kami menutup meja dengan taplak meja.
translations.sv: Vi lägger en duk på bordet.
translations.ro: Acoperim masa cu o față de masă.
translations.da: Vi dækker bordet med en dug.
translations.ja: テーブルにテーブルクロスを敷きます。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/colloquial 'we' subject pronoun; 3rd person singular subject.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular (agrees with 'on'); transitive.
Definite article, feminine singular; determines 'table'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'couvre'.
Preposition introducing an instrumental phrase.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; determines 'nappe'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of 'avec' (instrument).

sentences.target: Je veux couvrir la plante ce soir.
sentences.reading: /ʒə vø kuvʁiʁ la plɑ̃t sə swaʁ/

translations.fr: Je veux couvrir la plante ce soir.
translations.ipa: /ʒə vø kuvʁiʁ la plɑ̃t sə swaʁ/
translations.en: I want to cover the plant tonight.
translations.es: Quiero cubrir la planta esta noche.
translations.de: Ich will die Pflanze heute Abend abdecken.
translations.zh-Hans: 我今晚想把植物盖起来。
translations.yue: 我今晚想蓋住嗰棵植物。
translations.ru: Я хочу накрыть растение сегодня вечером.
translations.pt: Quero cobrir a planta esta noite.
translations.he: אני רוצה לכסות את הצמח הלילה.
translations.vi: Tối nay tôi muốn che cây.
translations.nl: Ik wil vanavond de plant afdekken.
translations.uk: Я хочу накрити рослину сьогодні ввечері.
translations.hu: Ma este le akarom takarni a növényt.
translations.hi: मैं आज रात पौधे को ढकना चाहता हूँ.
translations.el: Θέλω να σκεπάσω το φυτό απόψε.
translations.nb: Jeg vil dekke til planten i kveld.
translations.id: Saya ingin menutupi tanaman malam ini.
translations.sv: Jag vill täcka växten i kväll.
translations.da: Jeg vil dække planten til i aften.
translations.ja: 今夜は植物にカバーをかけたいです。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular subject pronoun; subject of the matrix verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; takes an infinitival complement.
Infinitive verb; complement (xcomp) of 'veux'.
Definite article, feminine singular; determines 'plante'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'couvrir'.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; determines 'soir' (temporal expression).
Common noun, masculine singular; temporal complement ('ce soir').
